description: Fragment of a legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 12th century. In which someone acknowledges a debt of 100 dinars to another person. The. names of the parties appear, but they are very faded. In the margin refers to something feminine or plural "coming from Tilimsān." On recto there are a few words in Arabic script, very faded. VMR. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
